name: eco-squad-backend
description: EcoSquad Serverless Backend - AWS Lambda Functions

scripts.build:prod: npm run build && npm run package
scripts.package: mkdir -p dist/functions && cp -r src/functions/* dist/functions/ && npm run install:deps
scripts.install:deps: cd dist/functions && for dir in */; do (cd "$dir" && npm install --production 2>/dev/null || true); done
